testsuite.name: com.streambridge.ingestion.EventParserTest

testcase.name: returns empty Optional for blank input
RawEvent record throws on null id
returns empty Optional for malformed JSON
parsed timestamp falls back to now for invalid format
parses a valid JSON event line correctly

testsuite.system-out:
18:34:02,899 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.LoggerContext[default] - This is logback-classic version 1.5.6 18:34:02,899 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.util.ContextInitializer@7966baa7 - No custom configurators were discovered as a service. 18:34:02,900 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.util.ContextInitializer@7966baa7 - Trying to configure with ch.qos.logback.classic.joran.SerializedModelConfigurator 18:34:02,900 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.util.ContextInitializer@7966baa7 - Constructed configurator of type class ch.qos.logback.classic.joran.SerializedModelConfigurator 18:34:02,901 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.LoggerContext[default] - Could NOT find resource [logback-test.scmo] 18:34:02,901 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.LoggerContext[default] - Could NOT find resource [logback.scmo] 18:34:02,904 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.util.ContextInitializer@7966baa7 - ch.qos.logback.classic.joran.SerializedModelConfigurator.configure() call lasted 1 milliseconds.
